revision.comment: Reverted 2 edits by [[Special:Contributions/Cssq|Cssq]] ([[User talk:Cssq|talk]]) to last revision by SD0001
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R with old history
  |name=With old history
  |from=a page that was from a historic version of this Wikipedia project
  |all category=Redirects with old history
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R with old history
  |name=With old history
  |from=a page that was from a historic version of this Wikipedia project
  |all category=Redirects with old history
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R with old history
  |name=With old history
  |from=a page that was from a historic version of this Wikipedia project
  |all category=Redirects with old history
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

[[Category:refreshing imported pages]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R with old history
  |name=With old history
  |from=a page that was from a historic version of this Wikipedia project
  |all category=Redirects with old history
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:

</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R with old history
  |name=With old history
  |from=a page that was from a historic version of this Wikipedia project
  |all category=Redirects with old history
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->

</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}}

  |name=With old history

  |all category=Redirects with old history
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R with old history
  |name=With old history
  |from=a page that was from a historic version of this Wikipedia project
  |all category=Redirects with old history
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>

[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with old history |name=With old history |from=a page that was from a historic version of this Wikipedia project |all category=Redirects with old history |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with old history |name=With old history |from=a page that was from a historic version of this Wikipedia project |all category=Redirects with old history |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with old history |name=With old history |from=a page that was from a historic version of this Wikipedia project |all category=Redirects with old history |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R with old history |name=With old history |from=a page that was from a historic version of this Wikipedia project |all category=Redirects with old history |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
